---
title: "transit_test"
output: pdf_document
date: "2026-02-21"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE, message=F, warning=F}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
install.packages("tidytuesdayR")
install.packages("tidyverse")
require(ggplot2)
require(stringi)
require(tidyr)
require(dplyr)
```

## Getting the data

```{r}
# Getting the Data
transit_cost_2 <- read.csv("transit-1-16-2026.csv")
gdp_data <- read.csv("world-bank-gdp.csv")
country_code <- read.csv("country-code.csv")
```

## Cleaning

```{r}
transit2 <- transit_cost_2[c("Country", "City", "Start.year", "End.year", "RR.", "Length", "TunnelPer", "Tunnel", "Elevated", "Atgrade", "Stations", "Platform.Length...Meters.", "Year", "Real.cost..2023.dollars.", "Cost.km..2023.dollars.")]

cols <- c("Start.year", "End.year", "RR.", "Length", "TunnelPer", "Tunnel", "Elevated", "Atgrade", "Stations", "Platform.Length...Meters.", "Year", "Real.cost..2023.dollars.", "Cost.km..2023.dollars.")
for(col in cols){
  transit2[,col] <- as.numeric(transit2[,col])
}

transit2$Years <- transit2$End.year - transit2$Start.year

transit2
```




## Exploratory plots/statistics
```{r}
stats <- matrix()
```
### Year
```{r}
ggplot(transit2) +
  geom_histogram(aes(x=Start.year, color='Start Year'),binwidth=1) +
  theme_bw() +
  xlab("Year") +
  ylab("Count") +
  labs(title="Number of Projects Starting Each Year") +
  geom_histogram(aes(x=End.year, color='End Year'), binwidth=1)

stats[1:3]<-summarise(.data=transit2,
          "5th" = quantile(transit2["Start.year"], 0.05, na.rm=T),
          Median = median(transit2$Start.year, na.rm=T),
          "95th" = quantile(transit2["Start.year"], 0.95, na.rm=T))
```
###Cost-km
```{r}
ggplot(transit2, aes(x=Cost.km..2023.dollars.)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth=50, color='black') +
  theme_bw() +
  xlab("Cost/km (millions of 2023 dollars)") +
  ylab("Number of Projects") +
  labs(title="Number of Projects vs. Cost/km")

summarise(.data=transit2,
          "5th"=quantile(transit2["Cost.km..2023.dollars."], 0.05, na.rm=T),
          Median = median(transit2$Cost.km..2023.dollars., na.rm=T),
          "95th"=quantile(transit2["Cost.km..2023.dollars."], 0.95, na.rm=T))
```

```{r}
ggplot(transit2, aes(x=Length)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth=5, color='black') +
  theme_bw() +
  xlab("Length (km)") +
  ylab("Number of Projects") +
  labs(title="Number of Projects vs. Length (km)")

summarise(.data=transit2,
          "5th"=quantile(transit2["Length"], 0.05, na.rm=T),
          Median = median(transit2$Length, na.rm=T),
          "95th"=quantile(transit2["Length"], 0.95, na.rm=T))

```
```{r}
m <- matrix(ncol=3)
s <- c("Start.year", "End.year", "Cost.km..2023.dollars.", "Length")
for(colname in s){
  m <- rbind(m, summarise(.data=transit2,
          "5th"=quantile(transit2[s], 0.05, na.rm=T),
          Median = median(as.vector(transit2[s]), na.rm=T),
          "95th"=quantile(transit2[s], 0.95, na.rm=T)))
  
}
typeof(as.vector(transit2["Length"]))
```

## GDP

```{r}
gdp_data
colnames(gdp_data)
```



## Old stuff with other dataset

```{r}
tuesdata <- tidytuesdayR::tt_load('2021-01-05')
tuesdata <- tidytuesdayR::tt_load(2021, week = 2)

transit_cost <- tuesdata$transit_cost
```

```{r}
#remove variables we didnt use before submitting
transit <- transit_cost[c("country", "city", "line", "start_year", "end_year", "rr", "length", "tunnel_per", "tunnel", "stations", "year", "real_cost", "cost_km_millions")]
transit
transit$tunnel_per <- as.double(sapply(transit$tunnel_per, FUN=stri_sub, from=1, to=-2))
transit$start_year <- as.double(transit$start_year) #14 NAs added
transit$end_year <- as.double(transit$end_year) #3 NAs added
transit$real_cost <- as.double(transit$real_cost) #7 NAs added
transit$years <- transit$end_year - transit$start_year
```

```{r}
ggplot(transit, aes(x=year)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth=1) +
  theme_bw()

summarise(.data=transit,
          quantile(transit["year"], 0.05, na.rm=T),
          median = median(transit$year, na.rm=T),
          quantile(transit["year"], 0.95, na.rm=T))

ggplot(transit, aes(x=cost_km_millions)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth=50) +
  theme_bw()

summarise(.data=transit,
          quantile(transit["cost_km_millions"], 0.05, na.rm=T),
          median = median(transit$cost_km_millions, na.rm=T),
          quantile(transit["cost_km_millions"], 0.95, na.rm=T))

ggplot(transit, aes(x=country)) +
  geom_bar(binwidth=50) +
  theme_bw()

summarise(.data=transit,
          quantile(transit["cost_km_millions"], 0.05, na.rm=T),
          median = median(transit$cost_km_millions, na.rm=T),
          quantile(transit["cost_km_millions"], 0.95, na.rm=T))

num <- summarize(.data=group_by(.data=transit, country),
          n = n())

num <- num[order(num$n, decreasing=T),]

other <- c("Other", sum(num[15:length(num),"n"]))
bar_num <- rbind(num[1:14,], other)


```

```{r}


```
